prompt: Engineering Manager screening at French SaaS scale-up. Candidate is Tech Lead at Datadog wanting to transition to management. Key question: ready for full people management?

assertions.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale (e.g., 1-5)
Strengths section exists with specific evidence from the profile
Gaps section exists, distinguishing unknowns from concerns
Risks section addresses tech-lead-to-manager transition risk
Interview questions use behavioral format targeting perf management and conflict resolution
Includes a scoring rubric for the call
Questions target the specific gaps (perf management experience, letting go of code)
The entire output is in French (matching the user's language)
